WebReferences.TitleEn: Nicol, Julia. Sentencing in Canada. Publication No. 2020-06-E. Library of Parliament, 22 May 2020.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Nicol, Julia. La détermination de la peine au Canada. Publication no 2020-06-F. Bibliothèque du Parlement, 22 mai 2020.
WebReferences.Title: Nicol, Julia. Sentencing in Canada. Publication No. 2020-06-E. Library of Parliament, 22 May 2020.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Discretion in Sentencing. Research at a Glance. Department of Justice, March 2018.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Pouvoir discrétionnaire en matière de détermination de la peine. Recherche en un coup d’œil. Ministère de la justice, mars 2018.
WebReferences.Title: Discretion in Sentencing. Research at a Glance. Department of Justice, March 2018.

WebReferences.TitleEn: “Understanding How Sentences of Two Years or More in Custody are Calculated.” Victims of Crime Research Digest, No. 16, 2023.
WebReferences.TitleFr: “Comprendre la façon dont les peines de deux ans ou plus en détention sont calculées. ” Recueil de recherches sur les victimes d’actes criminels, no 16, 2023.
WebReferences.Title: “Understanding How Sentences of Two Years or More in Custody are Calculated.” Victims of Crime Research Digest, No. 16, 2023.
